European Workshop for International Studies to be held at Kadir Has University on July 3-5, 2024

European Workshop for International Studies (EWIS)

The future yet to come: for a global politics of hope

başlığını taşıyor.

The EWIS workshop series, launched by EISA in 2013, provides an environment where experts from the European International Relations community, coming from various institutions, countries and disciplines, can hold ongoing and in-depth discussions.

The deadline for submitting proposals for this year’s workshop is Thursday, November 23, 2023.

You can access the application information and all other details for the workshop proposals from the link: https://eisa-net.org/ewis-2024/
